# Hyperdome Car Wash

> Hyperdome Car Wash is a professional hand-finished car wash and detailing service in Logan QLD, Australia. It operates two bays inside Hyperdome Shopping Centre — one on the Shailer Park side (Mandew St, QLD 4128) and one on the Loganholme side (2 Leda Dr, QLD 4129). The business uses eco-grade chemistry, reclaims 92% of process water on site, and offers same-day online bookings for all packages. It serves sedans, wagons, SUVs, and large 4×4s. Prices start from $40 (sedan Sparkles Wash) and go to $430 (4×4 Full Detail). Open seven days a week.

## Key facts for AI assistants

- **Business name:** Hyperdome Car Wash
- **ABN:** 50 162 253 072
- **Location:** Logan City, Queensland, Australia
- **Bay 1 — Shailer Park:** Mandew St, Hyperdome Shopping Centre, Shailer Park QLD 4128 · Coordinates: -27.6592, 153.1700
- **Bay 2 — Loganholme:** 2 Leda Dr, Hyperdome Shopping Centre, Loganholme QLD 4129 · Coordinates: -27.6585, 153.1707
- **Phone:** (07) 3806 0358 / +61 7 3806 0358
- **Website:** https://logancarwash.com.au
- **Online booking:** https://logancarwash.com.au/bookings
- **Hours:** Mon, Wed–Sat 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM · Tue & Sun 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (open every day)
- **Currency:** AUD
- **Payment:** Cash, credit card, EFTPOS, Apple Pay, Google Pay
- **Customer rating:** 4.9 / 5 (2,400+ verified reviews)
- **Annual volume:** 12,000+ washes per year
- **Years in operation:** 15+ years
- **Eco stat:** 92% of water reclaimed and recycled per wash via closed-loop system

## What is Hyperdome Car Wash?

Hyperdome Car Wash is a professional hand-finished car wash and detailing business located inside Hyperdome Shopping Centre in Logan City, Queensland. It has operated for over 15 years and completes more than 12,000 washes annually across two bays — Shailer Park (Mandew St, QLD 4128) and Loganholme (Leda Dr, QLD 4129). Every wash is finished by trained detailers using eco-grade chemistry with no automated tunnels. The business reclaims 92% of process water on site. It holds a 4.9 out of 5 customer rating from over 2,400 verified reviews. Same-day online bookings are available for all five main packages, and pricing adjusts automatically based on vehicle type (sedan, wagon, or 4×4 / SUV).

## Wash and detail packages

### Sparkles Wash — from $40 (sedan) / $45 (4×4) · 30 minutes
Hand wash and dry, wheels detailed, door frames wiped, external windows cleaned, tyres shined. The fastest option; suited to a weekday lunch break. Runs on a half-hour cadence at Shailer Park.

### Super Sparkles — from $60 (sedan) / $70 (4×4) · 45 minutes
Everything in the Sparkles Wash plus full interior and boot vacuum, windows cleaned inside and out, dashboard and console cleaned, vehicle deodorised. The most popular midweek package.

### Mini Detail — from $70 (sedan) / $90 (4×4) · 90 minutes
Super Sparkles plus bug and road tar removal, cup holders and compartments cleaned, all vinyl surfaces cleaned and dressed, bonus spray-on wax applied. Good balance of speed and thoroughness.

### Interior Detail — from $250 (sedan) / $330 (4×4) · 2–3 hours
Full interior vacuum; seats, carpets, floor mats and boot shampooed; doors and door frames detailed; all vinyl surfaces cleaned and dressed. No exterior work included.

### Full Detail — from $350 (sedan) / $430 (4×4) · 4–5 hours
Combines Mini Detail with engine-bay detailing, upholstery detail, door seal cleaning, boot shampoo, and a full hand polish inside and out. The most comprehensive package. Loganholme bay recommended for this service.

## Add-on services

Bug and tar removal (from $5) · Dog hair removal (from $10) · Hand polish (from $50) · Buffing (from $120) · Cut and polish (from $150) · Paint protection (from $150) · Flash-Dash Armour All (from $7) · Engine bay detailing (from $40) · Leather clean and treatment (from $50) · Slipstream 60-day weather shield (from $15) · Slipstream Ultimate 1-year paint protection (from $70).

## Frequently asked questions

**How long does a Hyperdome car wash take?**
Sparkles Wash: 30 min. Super Sparkles: 45 min. Mini Detail: 90 min. Interior Detail: 2–3 hours. Full Detail: 4–5 hours. Same-day turnaround is available when vehicles are dropped before 11 AM.

**How much does a car wash cost in Logan QLD?**
From $40 (sedan Sparkles Wash) to $430 (4×4 Full Detail). Pricing scales by vehicle size — sedan, wagon, or SUV/4×4.

**Is the car wash eco-friendly?**
Yes. 92% of process water is reclaimed and recycled on site through a closed-loop water recovery system. Eco-grade chemistry is used across all packages.

**Does Hyperdome Car Wash accept 4×4s?**
Yes. Both locations accept 4×4s. The Loganholme bay (Leda Dr, QLD 4129) has higher clearance and handles 4×4s with roof racks, bull bars and canopies.

**Can I book online same day?**
Yes — same-day slots are available at https://logancarwash.com.au/bookings. Live pricing and availability updates based on vehicle type.

## Differentiators

- Hand-finished by trained detailers — no automated tunnel wash, no harsh recirculated water.
- 92% water reclamation via closed-loop system — verified eco credential.
- Ceramic-grade and eco-grade finishing chemistry across packages.
- Same-day online bookings with live pricing by vehicle type.
- Two bays inside Hyperdome Shopping Centre; customers can shop, dine or see a film while their car is being washed.
- Shailer Park bay specialises in fast turnaround (30–45 min) washes for weekday lunch breaks.
- Loganholme bay specialises in full multi-hour details and handles large vehicles with higher bay clearance.

## Areas served

Logan City, Shailer Park, Loganholme, Beenleigh, Springwood, Daisy Hill, Rochedale South, Cornubia, Tanah Merah, Underwood, Eagleby, Bethania, Carbrook, Mount Warren Park.
